name: Dirty Dozen Motorcycle Club
description: The Dirty Dozen Motorcycle Club was an outlaw motorcycle club based in Arizona, founded in 1964 by twelve founding members. It became the largest and most violent motorcycle gang in the state, involved in drug trafficking, arms trafficking, prostitution, assault, and murder. The club merged with the Hells Angels in 1997.
